_comment: Copy templates.es.json or templates.en.json to templates.json and edit freely.

eliminated.title: 💀 {player} has been ELIMINATED
eliminated.description: Lost all their lives. Spectator forever.

storm_start.title: ⛈️ The storm begins
storm_start.description: It cannot be skipped: you may sleep, but it will not leave.

end_open.title: 🌌 The End is OPEN
end_open.description: Day {day}. The portal is no longer sealed.

dragon_down.title: 🐉 The Dragon has fallen
dragon_down.description:
Dropped **{hearts}** Hearts. They fell with lightning at:
**{coords}**

revived.title: ✟ {player} IS BACK
revived.description: Their life was restored. They have **{lives}** life(s).

death_clip.title: 🎧 {player}'s last words
death_clip.description: Their final minute of voice: 50s before death and 10s after.
